title: TrainAnnounce
body:
add playsound.
sound id:custom.n700
It works well with mtr
This sound effect is made for the purpose of creating a station
By using command blocks, you can specify a range and play sound effects for people around the station
when a train approaches!
This is the sound effect that means 
"A train is coming. Please wait inside the yellow line as it is dangerous."
enjoy :)
